error_message: test_render_tiles_creates_files: assert 0 > 0 — render_tiles returned 0 tiles written
root_cause: In render_tiles(), _lat_lon_to_tile(lat_max, lon_min, z) returns (tx_min, ty_min) — the top-left tile — but was incorrectly destructured as (tx_min, ty_max). Similarly _lat_lon_to_tile(lat_min, lon_max, z) was destructured as (tx_max, ty_min). This swapped ty_min and ty_max so range(ty_min, ty_max+1) was always empty (e.g. range(6,6) instead of range(5,7)).
fix: Swapped the destructuring: tx_min, ty_min = _lat_lon_to_tile(lat_max, lon_min, z) and tx_max, ty_max = _lat_lon_to_tile(lat_min, lon_max, z).
